creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
Ok.  I will clise this pr and wait for updates
--
Michael Scheidell
CTO SECNAP Network Security

"Herbert J. Skuhra" <h.skuhra@gmail.com> wrote:


On Wed, Dec 7, 2011 at 02:47, Michael Scheidell <scheidell@freebsd.org> wro=
te:
> I noticed the first patch had a patch to ../freebsd/Makefile.. and the
> second patch did not.
>
> can maintainer please confirm? patch #2 replaces patch #1?

I am not the maintainer.

The patch to freebsd/Makefile is no longer required. The typo was
fixed before the 1.8.1 (actually right after the 1.8.0) release:

<https://opensource.conformal.com/viewgit/?a=3Dcommitdiff&p=3Dxxxterm&h=3D6=
6dd8455e96be397db325f15305c6ef3e3172594>

There will be a 1.9.0 release soon...

--
Herbert
